# This is a sample of the ClinVar hgvs4variation.txt file format.
# The real file begins with many comment lines explaining each column.
# There is NO usable tab-delimited header row; data must be parsed by fixed
# positional columns, skipping every line that starts with '#'.
#
# Column positions (tab-delimited):
#   0  GeneSymbol
#   1  GeneID
#   2  VariationID
#   3  AlleleID
#   4  Type
#   5  Assembly
#   6  NucleotideExpression
#   7  NucleotideChange
#   8  ProteinExpression
#   9  ProteinChange
#  10  UsedForNaming
#  11  Submitted
#  12  OnRefSeqGene
#
# Sentinel for an empty/absent value is '-'.
BRCA1	672	100001	200001	coding	GRCh38	NM_007294.4(BRCA1):c.5266dupC	c.5266dupC	NP_009225.1:p.Gln1756fs	p.Gln1756fs	Yes	No	No
BRCA1	672	100001	200001	genomic	GRCh38	NC_000017.11:g.43094464dupG	g.43094464dupG	-	-	No	No	No
BRCA1	672	100001	200001	coding	GRCh37	NM_007294.3(BRCA1):c.5266dupC	c.5266dupC	-	-	No	No	No
BRCA1	672	100002	200002	coding	GRCh38	NM_007294.4(BRCA1):c.181T>G	c.181T>G	NP_009225.1:p.Cys61Gly	p.Cys61Gly	Yes	No	No
BRCA1	672	100002	200002	genomic	GRCh38	NC_000017.11:g.43106487A>C	g.43106487A>C	-	-	No	No	No

MLH1	4292	100011	200011	coding	GRCh38	NM_000249.4(MLH1):c.350C>T	c.350C>T	NP_000240.1:p.Thr117Met	p.Thr117Met	Yes	No	No
MLH1	4292	100011	200011	genomic	GRCh38	NC_000003.12:g.36993455C>T	g.36993455C>T	-	-	No	No	No
